mechanics.text:
SKILLS
LANOUAOEB" Although English is the Iingua franca of known space there are dozens of other languages and hundreds of dialects in com- mon usage across the Inner Sphere In the Draconis Combine_ for exampl the official language is Japanese. Over the cen turies new languages have developed such as the Swedenese used in the Free Rasalhague Republic which is an interesting mixture of Japanese and Swedish Each affiliation description (p. 26) indicates primary and sec ondary languages, some of which are automatically known starting characters and NPCs from that region (see Free Skills under Stage 1: Early Childhood, p. 33). Additional languages may be acquired through the Life Path or character advancement. Each Language Skill includes the ability to speak_ read and write depending on the skill bonus: +0 confers the ability t0 understand the language and speak well enough to be under- stood but only basic reading and no writing; +1 allows fluent speech and reading_ as well as reasonable writing; +2 or better indicates complete fluency in speaking; reading and writing: Language Skill Checks are only necessary if character IS trying t0 understand an unusual dialect Or read very compli: cated Or technical document; Note that even though languages are considered difficult skills character' native language is not considered difficult for purposes of his skill advancement
Aikido This subskill represents various defensive forms such as aikido judo t'ai chi ch uan and karate do concentrates on throwing; locking and attempting neutralize your opponent without striking him: Aikido Dodge (Defense): Your opponent' TN to hit you increased by but your character cannot inflict damage this round of melee Topple (Defense): Your character" TN to hit is decreased by 2 and you cannot inflict damage this round_ However, if You win the round of melee combat, the attacker is knocked prone Throw (Defense): character must have +2 Skill Bonus or better in Aikido t0 use this maneuver: Costs Fatigue. suc cesstul; you throw your opponent number of meters equal to half your Strength (round down); and he lands prone
Battlesuit Unlike other Martial Arts the Battlesuit Subskill confers specia maneuvers It is simply the skill battle-armored troop er uses to make melee attacks adding the skill bonus t0 Action Check result.
Gung Fu Also known as kung fu_ this style attempts t0 familiarize person with all types of physica combat rather than specializing one specific area; this includes percussive (offensive) and nonpercussive (defensive) moves as well as weapon training: Other  forms ot  martia arts covered by  this subskill include shaolin, escrima and pentjak silat: Dodge (Defense): Your opponent" you increased by 3 but your character cannot inflict damage this round Sweep (Attack): Your target number to hit is increased by but successful your opponent is knocked prone in addition to taking normal damage Weapon Style: character must have +2 Skill Bonus Or better in Gung Fu to use this maneuver: It allows you to use any ol your known Martial Arts maneuvers with weapons that YOU are skilled in. Use the lower of your Weapon Skill Bonus or the Martia Arts Skill Bonus for that maneuver to resolve the attack
LEADERSHIP The Leadership Skill is used to direct and command others in jobs or military operations. Skill Checks are required to deter mine if subordinates follow the commands ssued with difficul ty modifiers based on the complexity of the orders one character with Leadership Skill designated the leader of team of characters, and he has some way to keep in touch with his team such as microcommunicators), he can provide an Initiative bonus t0 the members of his team (see Initiative 110).
MARTIAL ARTS" The Martial Arts Subskills represent some of the many vari- eties of unarmed fighting techniques in use in the thirty-first century: Each Martial Arts Subskill is intended t0 represent range of similar styles  For example  character with Martial Arts /Tae kwon do might be using that specific style or another style that focuses on kicking, such as savate 0r muay thai. For simplicity' sake, we have simply used the most commonly rec ognized names for these general style subskills character with Martial Arts adds his skill bonus t0 his Action Check result in melee combat. For each skill bonus point in Martial Arts the character may choose t0 learn one of the fol lowing maneuvers See also Special Maneuvers 114, For clarity, we use the term you" when referring to your character and your opponent when referring to the other char- acter in tne melee_
Karate This subskill is highly offensive martial art form; It con centrates On delivering blows with hands_ elbows knees and feet to vital parts of the body: such as the stomach and throat Feint (Attack): Your target number to hit iS decreased by but damage iS divided in half (round down); target must make Knockdown Test you win the round even if the attack inflicts Fatigue. Block (Defense): Your opponent" damage is divided in half (round down) but you cannot inflict damage this round. Precision Hit (Attack): character must have +2 Skili Bonus or better in Karate to use this maneuver. When making an aimed shot at specific location, the target number receives 3 Modifier.
